    (1:0) impor                   <--      (3:0) var _
          ^                                      ^

    (2:0) impor                   <--      (4:0) var _
          ^                                      ^

    (3:0) impor                   <--      (5:0) var _
          ^                                      ^

    (4:0) impor                   <--      (6:0) var a
          ^                                      ^

    (6:0) conso                   <--      (7:0) conso
          ^                                      ^

    (6:7) sole.log(               <--      (7:7) sole.log(
              ^                                      ^

    (6:8) ole.log(a               <--      (7:8) ole.log(_
              ^                                      ^

   (6:11) .log(aDef               <--     (7:11) .log(_one
              ^                                      ^

   (6:12) log(aDefa               <--     (7:12) log(_one.
              ^                                      ^

   (6:20) ault);                  <--     (7:24) ault);
              ^                                      ^

   (6:21) ult);                   <--     (7:25) ult);
              ^                                      ^

    (7:0) conso                   <--      (8:0) conso
          ^                                      ^

    (7:7) sole.log(               <--      (8:7) sole.log(
              ^                                      ^

    (7:8) ole.log(a               <--      (8:8) ole.log(_
              ^                                      ^

   (7:11) .log(aNam               <--     (8:11) .log(_two
              ^                                      ^

   (7:12) log(aName               <--     (8:12) log(_two.
              ^                                      ^

   (7:12) log(aName               <--     (8:17) two.aName
              ^                                      ^

   (7:18) amed);                  <--     (8:23) amed);
              ^                                      ^

   (7:19) med);                   <--     (8:24) med);
              ^                                      ^

    (8:0) conso                   <--      (9:0) conso
          ^                                      ^

    (8:7) sole.log(               <--      (9:7) sole.log(
              ^                                      ^

    (8:8) ole.log(a               <--      (9:8) ole.log(_
              ^                                      ^

   (8:11) .log(anAl               <--     (9:11) .log(_thr
              ^                                      ^

   (8:12) log(anAli               <--     (9:12) log(_thre
              ^                                      ^

   (8:21) ased);                  <--     (9:23) orig);
              ^                                      ^

   (8:22) sed);                   <--     (9:24) rig);
              ^                                      ^

    (9:0) conso                   <--     (10:0) conso
          ^                                      ^

    (9:7) sole.log(               <--     (10:7) sole.log(
              ^                                      ^

    (9:8) ole.log(a               <--     (10:8) ole.log(a
              ^                                      ^

   (9:11) .log(aNam               <--    (10:11) .log(aNam
              ^                                      ^

   (9:12) log(aName               <--    (10:12) log(aName
              ^                                      ^

   (9:22) pace);                  <--    (10:22) pace);
              ^                                      ^

   (9:23) ace);                   <--    (10:23) ace);
              ^                                      ^

   (11:0) conso                   <--     (11:0) conso
          ^                                      ^

   (11:7) sole.log(               <--     (11:7) sole.log(
              ^                                      ^

   (11:8) ole.log(a               <--     (11:8) ole.log((
              ^                                      ^

  (11:11) .log(aDef               <--    (11:11) .log((0, 
              ^                                      ^

  (11:12) log(aDefa               <--    (11:12) log((0, _
              ^                                      ^

  (11:12) log(aDefa               <--    (11:16) (0, _one.
              ^                                      ^

  (11:20) ault());                <--    (11:28) ault)());
              ^                                      ^

  (11:21) ult());                 <--    (11:30) lt)());
              ^                                      ^

  (11:22) lt());                  <--    (11:31) t)());
              ^                                      ^

  (11:23) t());                   <--    (11:32) )());
              ^                                      ^

   (12:0) conso                   <--     (12:0) conso
          ^                                      ^

   (12:7) sole.log(               <--     (12:7) sole.log(
              ^                                      ^

   (12:8) ole.log(a               <--     (12:8) ole.log((
              ^                                      ^

  (12:11) .log(aNam               <--    (12:11) .log((0, 
              ^                                      ^

  (12:12) log(aName               <--    (12:12) log((0, _
              ^                                      ^

  (12:12) log(aName               <--    (12:16) (0, _two.
              ^                                      ^

  (12:12) log(aName               <--    (12:21) two.aName
              ^                                      ^

  (12:18) amed());                <--    (12:27) amed)());
              ^                                      ^

  (12:19) med());                 <--    (12:29) ed)());
              ^                                      ^

  (12:20) ed());                  <--    (12:30) d)());
              ^                                      ^

  (12:21) d());                   <--    (12:31) )());
              ^                                      ^

   (13:0) conso                   <--     (13:0) conso
          ^                                      ^

   (13:7) sole.log(               <--     (13:7) sole.log(
              ^                                      ^

              ^                                      ^

              ^                                      ^

              ^                                      ^

              ^                                      ^

              ^                                      ^

              ^                                      ^

  (13:23) ed());                  <--    (13:30) g)());
              ^                                      ^

  (13:24) d());                   <--    (13:31) )());
              ^                                      ^

   (14:0) conso                   <--     (14:0) conso
          ^                                      ^

              ^                                      ^
